title: [codereview-pass1] coap_server.h unconditional oscore.h include may bloat public API or cause config issues
description: Client uses conditional #if defined(CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_CLIENT_OSCORE). Server now includes unconditionally. If OSCORE disabled, may pull unnecessary code or fail if oscore subsys not selected. Consider forward declare again or conditional but keep signature stable. P2 API/maintainability. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-jqdq
close_reason: Addressed with forward declare instead of unconditional include; coap/socket includes added separately. 3 codereview passes filed and resolved
